info.name: PersonalAPI - Production Grade
info.description: Comprehensive Postman collection for currently implemented PersonalAPI endpoints. Includes auth automation, reusable variables, and response assertions for regression-safe API verification.

variable.description: GitHub user login returned by callback
Repository name used in webhook payload tests
Set true to apply Google auto-sync toggle to gmail/drive/gcal together
Notion internal integration token (starts with ntn_ or secret_)
Item UUID for MCP /tools/item/{item_id} — copy an id from MCP Search results

request.description: Liveness endpoint for container health probes and smoke checks.
Checks Ollama/LLM readiness status exposed by the backend.
Returns OpenAPI JSON for contract inspection and tool import.
FastAPI Swagger UI endpoint.
FastAPI Swagger OAuth redirect helper route.
FastAPI ReDoc documentation endpoint.
Creates a new user account. May return 409 if the user already exists.
Authenticates a user and captures the access token into collection variables.
Login/signup using Google ID token. Set googleIdToken from frontend Google auth flow or Google OAuth Playground.

exec: throw new Error('googleIdToken is empty. Provide a Google ID token first.');

request.description: Returns Google OAuth URL for app login/signup callback flow.

exec: try { var parsed = new URL(body.url); var state = parsed.searchParams.get('state'); if (state) pm.collectionVariables.set('googleAuthState', state); } catch (e) {}

request.description: Exchanges Google code+state and returns PersonalAPI access token.

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('googleAuthCode')) { throw new Error('googleAuthCode is empty. Complete Google consent first.'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('googleAuthState')) { throw new Error('googleAuthState is empty. Run Google OAuth Connect first.'); }

request.description: Returns the authenticated user profile using Bearer token.
Returns paginated email-like items for the authenticated user.
Returns paginated document-like items for the authenticated user.
Runs semantic-style search over user-scoped items and returns ranked results.

exec: pm.test('Search response contract is valid', function () {

request.description: Runs semantic search with score debug details per result (title/content similarity and weighted score).

exec: pm.test('Debug fields exist on first result', function () {

request.description: Sends a chat message through RAG and returns assistant response with session id.
Sends a chat message through RAG with per-source debug score breakdown in sources[].debug.

exec: pm.test('Debug fields exist on first source', function () {

request.description: Returns chronological chat history for a session id.

exec: throw new Error('chatSessionId is empty. Run Chat -> Send Message first.');
pm.test('History response is array', function () { pm.expect(body).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description: Creates a developer API key and stores the raw key and id into collection variables for chained testing.

exec: pm.test('API key payload is valid', function () {

request.description: Lists all API keys for the authenticated user, newest first.

exec: pm.test('Response is an array', function () { pm.expect(body).to.be.an('array'); });

request.description: Revokes the selected API key by id. Requires apiKeyId variable from Create API Key request.

exec: throw new Error('apiKeyId is empty. Run Create API Key first.');

request.description: Lists all connectors for the authenticated user.
Returns Google OAuth connect URL for gmail/drive/gcal connector onboarding.

exec: try { var parsed = new URL(body.url); var state = parsed.searchParams.get('state'); if (state) pm.collectionVariables.set('googleAuthState', state); } catch (e) {}

request.description: Exchanges Google auth code/state and creates connector for selected platform encoded in state.

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('googleAuthCode')) { throw new Error('googleAuthCode is empty. Complete Google consent first.'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('googleAuthState')) { throw new Error('googleAuthState is empty. Run Google Connector - Get Connect URL first.'); }

request.description: Shortcut: returns Google OAuth URL for Gmail connector onboarding.
Shortcut: returns Google OAuth URL for Drive connector onboarding.
Shortcut: returns Google OAuth URL for Calendar connector onboarding.
Returns GitHub OAuth authorize URL for the current user.
Exchanges GitHub auth code/state and stores the GitHub connector access token.

exec: if (!normalizedCode) { throw new Error('githubAuthCode is empty. Complete GitHub consent first.'); }
if (!normalizedState) { throw new Error('githubAuthState is empty. Run GitHub - Get Connect URL first.'); }

request.description: Returns current GitHub connector state for the authenticated user.
Queues a GitHub sync job for repositories accessible by the connector token.

exec: pm.test('Sync queue response is valid', function () {

request.description: Sends a signed GitHub ping webhook to validate webhook secret wiring.

exec: if (!secret) { throw new Error('githubWebhookSecret is empty. Set it to backend GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET first.'); }

request.description: Sends a signed push webhook payload to test connector matching and sync queueing.

exec: if (!secret) { throw new Error('githubWebhookSecret is empty. Set it to backend GITHUB_WEBHOOK_SECRET first.'); }
if (!owner) { throw new Error('githubLogin is empty. Run GitHub - Callback (Manual Code Exchange) first.'); }

request.description: Returns Slack OAuth authorize URL for the current user.
Exchanges Slack auth code/state and stores Slack connector tokens.

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('slackAuthCode')) { throw new Error('slackAuthCode is empty. Complete Slack consent first.'); }
if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('slackAuthState')) { throw new Error('slackAuthState is empty. Run Slack - Get Connect URL first.'); }

request.description: Returns Spotify authorization URL for the current authenticated user.
Exchanges Spotify authorization code and state for stored connector tokens. Set spotifyAuthCode manually from browser callback URL.

exec: throw new Error('spotifyAuthCode is empty. Complete Spotify consent in browser and set it first.');
throw new Error('spotifyState is empty. Run Spotify - Get Connect URL first.');

request.description: Returns the saved Spotify connector state for the current user.
Queues a Spotify sync job (recently played + liked songs).

exec: pm.test('Sync queue response is valid', function () {

request.description: Register a Notion internal integration token directly (no OAuth needed). Get your token from https://www.notion.so/my-integrations
Get OAuth authorisation URL. Requires NOTION_CLIENT_ID + NOTION_CLIENT_SECRET in .env

exec: if (!pm.collectionVariables.get('notionAuthCode')) { throw new Error('Set notionAuthCode first'); }

request.description: Exchange Notion OAuth code. Paste code and state from browser redirect into collection variables.
Trigger incremental Notion workspace sync (pages + database rows).
Gets connector details for any platform (gmail|drive|gcal|spotify|notion|whatsapp).
Creates a dev bootstrap connector record for platform if missing.
Queues sync for selected connector platform.
Enables/disables periodic auto sync for a connector platform.
Shortcut: triggers Gmail sync.
Shortcut: triggers Drive sync.
Shortcut: triggers Google Calendar sync.
WhatsApp does not use OAuth. Bootstrap the connector by providing your custom WhatsApp API endpoint and access token. After this, trigger sync with POST /connectors/whatsapp/sync.
Queues a WhatsApp sync job. Requires the connector to be bootstrapped first.

exec: pm.test('Sync queue response is valid', function () {

request.description: Removes the connector row for the selected platform. For Google platforms (gmail/drive/gcal) all three sibling connectors are removed together by default (cascade_google=true). Synced items are NOT deleted unless delete_data=true is appended.
Removes the connector AND permanently deletes all synced items (and item_chunks via cascade) for the platform. Use with caution — this is irreversible.

exec: pm.test('Disconnect + delete response is valid', function () {

request.description: Shortcut: removes Gmail, Drive, and Google Calendar connectors in a single call (cascade_google=true). All three share one OAuth token so disconnecting one without cascading leaves orphaned connectors.

exec: pm.test('All three Google connectors removed', function () {
